quizzes.name: Mathematics Fundamentals
quizzes.description: Build your confidence with **core math concepts** — exponents, equations, geometry, and more.

quizzes.name: Computer Science Basics
quizzes.description: Fundamental concepts every programmer should know — data structures, loops, data types and more.

quizzes.name: Molecular Biology
quizzes.description: Explore the **molecules of life** — DNA, RNA, nucleotides, and gene expression.

quizzes.name: Bioinformatics
quizzes.description: An introduction to **computational biology** — sequence formats, BLAST, alignment, and genome assembly.

quizzes.name: Machine Learning Fundamentals
quizzes.description: Understand the **core concepts of machine learning** — supervised vs unsupervised learning, model evaluation, overfitting, and classic algorithms.

quizzes.name: Neural Networks & Deep Learning
quizzes.description: Explore the architecture and mechanics of **neural networks** — layers, activation functions, backpropagation, and convolutional networks.

quizzes.name: Statistics & Probability
quizzes.description: Master the **statistical foundations** essential for data science — distributions, hypothesis testing, confidence intervals, and Bayesian thinking.

quizzes.name: Linear Algebra for ML
quizzes.description: Build the **linear algebra intuition** needed for machine learning — vectors, matrices, eigenvalues, PCA, and SVD.

quizzes.name: Computer Security Basics
quizzes.description: Learn the **fundamentals of cybersecurity** — SQL injection, XSS, cryptography, authentication, and defence strategies.

quizzes.name: Network Security
quizzes.description: Understand **network security fundamentals** — firewalls, VPNs, TLS/SSL, DDoS, and intrusion detection.

quizzes.name: Advanced Molecular Biology
quizzes.description: Deepen your understanding of **molecular biology** — CRISPR, epigenetics, RNA interference, protein folding, and gene regulation.

quizzes.name: Advanced Bioinformatics
quizzes.description: Go deeper into **computational biology** — sequence alignment algorithms, variant calling, RNA-seq, protein structure prediction, and phylogenetics.

quizzes.name: Calculus & Mathematical Analysis
quizzes.description: Review the **core concepts of calculus** — limits, derivatives, integrals, and series — with applications to optimisation.

quizzes.name: CS: Algorithms & Data Structures
quizzes.description: Master **fundamental algorithms and data structures** — complexity analysis, sorting, trees, graphs, dynamic programming, and hashing.

quizzes.name: System Design: Architecture Patterns
quizzes.description: Explore **software architecture patterns** through visual diagrams — load balancing, microservices, event-driven systems, and more.

quizzes.name: Biologia molekularna
quizzes.description: Poznaj **cząsteczki życia** — DNA, RNA, nukleotydy i ekspresja genów.

quizzes.name: Zaawansowana biologia molekularna
quizzes.description: Pogłęb wiedzę z **biologii molekularnej** — CRISPR, epigenetyka, interferencja RNA i regulacja genów.

quizzes.name: Bioinformatyka
quizzes.description: Wprowadzenie do **bioinformatyki** — formaty sekwencji, BLAST, dopasowanie i składanie genomów.

quizzes.name: Zaawansowana bioinformatyka
quizzes.description: Zaawansowane zagadnienia **bioinformatyki obliczeniowej** — algorytmy dopasowania, RNA-seq, warianty i filogenetyka.

quizzes.name: Molecular Biology — Sorting
quizzes.description: Test your knowledge of the **correct order of molecular biology processes** — from DNA replication and transcription to translation and beyond.

quizzes.name: Biologia molekularna — Kolejność
quizzes.description: Sprawdź znajomość **kolejności procesów biologii molekularnej** — od replikacji DNA przez transkrypcję po translację i nie tylko.

quizzes.name: La Célula
quizzes.description: Aprende sobre la **unidad básica de la vida** — tipos de células, organelos y sus funciones.

quizzes.name: Fotosíntesis
quizzes.description: Entiende cómo las plantas convierten la **luz solar en energía** — reacciones de la luz, ciclo de Calvin y clorofila.

quizzes.name: El Cuerpo Humano
quizzes.description: Explora los **sistemas del cuerpo humano** — digestivo, circulatorio, nervioso y más.

quizzes.name: Genética Básica
quizzes.description: Fundamentos de la **herencia genética** — genes, cromosomas, leyes de Mendel y dominancia.

quizzes.name: Ecosistemas y Cadenas Alimentarias
quizzes.description: Descubre cómo fluye la **energía en los ecosistemas** — productores, consumidores, descomponedores y redes tróficas.

quizzes.name: Mathematical Functions & Graphs
quizzes.description: Explore **key function types** through interactive charts — linear, quadratic, cubic, and exponential functions visualised with Mermaid diagrams.

quizzes.name: Funkcje Matematyczne i Wykresy
quizzes.description: Poznaj **kluczowe typy funkcji** przez wykresy — liniowe, kwadratowe, sześcienne i wykładnicze.

quizzes.name: Python Basics
quizzes.description: Test your knowledge of **Python fundamentals** — syntax, data types, functions, and built-in operations.

quizzes.name: C++ Basics
quizzes.description: Test your knowledge of **C++ fundamentals** — types, references, pointers, vectors, and classes.

quizzes.name: TypeScript Basics
quizzes.description: Test your knowledge of **TypeScript fundamentals** — type annotations, interfaces, unions, generics, and optional chaining.

quizzes.name: Chemistry Fundamentals
quizzes.description: Explore **core chemistry concepts** — molecular structures, chemical formulas, bonding, and reactions. Features $\ce{mhchem}$ notation and interactive 2D molecular diagrams.

quizzes.name: Chemia Organiczna
quizzes.description: Poznaj **podstawy chemii organicznej** — węglowodory, grupy funkcyjne, reakcje kwas-zasada i struktury cząsteczkowe z notacją $\ce{mhchem}$ i diagramami SMILES.
